finding: review-library.md says 'Six core agents' and omits determinism-auditor, but seven agent files exist on disk and references/agents.md says 'Seven'.
recommendation: Update the count and list in review-library.md to include determinism-auditor.
proposed_change: Replace 'Six core agents ... `edge-case-hunter`. Everything else is here.' with 'Seven core agents ... `edge-case-hunter`, `determinism-auditor`. Everything else is here.'

finding: /repo-health flow says 'all 6 core agents + composable reviewers' so Full depth silently under-panels by skipping determinism-auditor.
recommendation: Change '6' to '7' so Full depth instantiates every named agent.

finding: drift-detector prompt instructs detectors to check 'am_i_done.py drift (MANDATORY_AGENTS vs actual agent files)', but am_i_done.py has no MANDATORY_AGENTS constant — the dispatch floor is loaded from dispatch-rules.json.
recommendation: Rewrite the instruction to reference dispatch-rules.json.
proposed_change: review-library.md:182 -> 'dispatch-rules.json drift (.work/config/dispatch-rules.json references agents that have no file in .claude/agents/, or agent files with no rule referencing them)'

finding: am_i_done.py --check config help text still mentions a 'MANDATORY_AGENTS table' that no longer exists.
recommendation: Update the docstring to describe what check_config actually does.
proposed_change: am_i_done.py:19 -> 'config    - validate .work/config/dispatch-rules.json references only agents that exist in .claude/agents/'

finding: references/agents.md links '[review-panels.md](review-panels.md)' as sibling, but the file actually lives at docs/review-panels.md. The link works only via the docs/agents.md symlink, not from the real path.
recommendation: Either co-locate review-panels.md with the other reference docs or fix the link target.

finding: Outcome-based drift categories require >=5 historical records; .work/reviews/ has only README.md.
recommendation: Accumulate review history before relying on outcome-based drift detection.
